name: x-yellow-blocker
description: Local MV3 extension that detects adult-solicitation tweets on X and can block high-confidence authors via the X UI.

scripts.check: node --check src/defaults.js && node --check src/detector.js && node --check src/x-ui-text.js && node --check src/mute-words.js && node --check src/remote-lists.js && node --check src/community-sharing.js && node --check src/background.js && node --check src/content.js && node --check popup/popup.js && node --check scripts/aggregate-community-reports.mjs
scripts.package: zip -r x-yellow-blocker.zip manifest.json src popup assets/icons blocklists docs README.md PRIVACY.md LICENSE package.json -x '*.DS_Store'
